extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian won from late breakaway absorption, outsprinting MARTIN/THOMAS/BARDET in final 300m after Cataldo caught
tactical_patterns: Sky/AG2R waited until 2km remaining to close 2-minute gap, prioritizing GC protection over stage control in rain.
Alaphilippe concealed himself in yellow jersey group all day before attacking final 300m, avoiding breakaway energy expenditure.
Cataldo escaped solo at km73 on Col du Manoir HC, maintained advantage through descent but caught 300m from line.

rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: positive: soloed from breakaway on HC climb, extended gap on wet descent, threatened GC by 2 minutes with 20km remaining
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: sat invisible in peloton while rivals chased, timed final attack perfectly for classics-style uphill finish
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: neutral: took yellow from teammate Kwiatkowski, Sky maintains GC control through team depth rotation
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: neutral: held yellow only one day, Sky willing to rotate leadership burden across multiple riders
